title: MajorZwey's Visible Axe
description: This adds a simple red outline to the Iron, Diamond and Netherite axe for better visibility in PvP.
body:
[![Discord Server Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/325a89553e2cccaaac1327a84a2b339a0c1d7ff6.webp)](https://discord.gg/MY8YtmtC3M)     [![Youtube Channel Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ca2512fe8cab08fdafee0d8f64757a0b29d57c7.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@MajorZwey)

# Overview
This adds a simple red outline to the Iron, Diamond and Netherite axe for better visibility in PvP.
# Features
- Red outline on the Iron Axe
- Red outline on the Diamond Axe
- Red outline on the Netherite Axe
# Why is this useful?
When you play a gamemode that includes a shield it makes the opponent's axe more visible so that you know when do they want to disable your shield!
